mapper.select: SELECT * FROM official_notice ORDER BY is_top DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO official_notice (title, content, scenic_spot_id, cover_image, is_top, is_published, published_at, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{scenicSpotId}, #{coverImage}, #{isTop}, #{isPublished}, NOW(), #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE official_notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, scenic_spot_id = #{scenicSpotId}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, is_top = #{isTop}, is_published = #{isPublished}, published_at = IF(#{isPublished}=1 AND is_published=0, NOW(), published_at), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE official_notice SET is_top = #{top} WHERE id = #{id}
